body: Love Philter's pattern sequencer lets the piano roll trigger different hand-drawn envelope shapes, so you can program rhythmic filter and gate movements that change per note or per bar - a fast route to dubstep-style talking filters and gated stabs.

Multiple filter units each carry their own envelopes, LFOs and a built-in waveshaper for distortion, so a single instance can stack filtering and drive. The X/Y controller maps two parameters for live performance.
